approval_status.reason: The latest main-thread approvals covered prior exact runs, but this micro-deficit exact run has not yet been explicitly approved.

ready_to_execute_if_later_approved.runner_behavior: micro-deficit trading rule disabled; diagnostic marker and scorer enabled

bounded_preflight_if_later_approved: Confirm no active xuan-research runner before start.
Confirm shared-ingress client inputs exist and are fresh without modifying them.
Confirm root disk and inode use are safe.
Confirm helper scripts exist and sudo -n -u pmofi works.
Copy only tools/xuan_dplus_passive_passive_shadow_runner.py into an isolated xuan_research run directory.
Do not repo sync/build, do not use service/systemd controls, do not modify broker/shared-ingress/env/live, and do not send orders/cancels/redeems.
post_run_review_chain_if_later_finished: shadow trading acceptance with research_ranking and promotion_gate reported separately
local-only next-target review before any runner implementation proposal

keep_requires: risk-adjusted proxy nonnegative or bounded fee-tradeoff explanation
micro-deficit residual-tail signature concentrated enough to nominate one local runner target without summary-only removal
unknown_if: risk budget fails despite positive pair economics
micro-deficit fields are present but concentration is not enough to nominate one safe local target
fee or worst-day tradeoff remains material
discard_if: future source_pair/source_residual labels would be required as live criteria
any private-truth, deployable, canary, or promotion claim is made
blocked_only_if: allowlisted artifacts are corrupt or missing

research_ranking.label: KEEP_MICRO_DEFICIT_EXACT_RUN_APPROVAL_PACKET_READY
research_ranking.interpretation: The exact diagnostic run packet is ready, but no remote run is authorized until the main thread explicitly approves late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review.

next_executable_action: If main thread explicitly approves late_repair90_micro_deficit_repair_guard_no_order_review, run bounded preflight and start exactly one diagnostic no-order shadow with the guard disabled and marker/scorer enabled; otherwise continue local-only and do not SSH.
